title: Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: What is the payroll schedule and how can I access my pay stubs?
A: Our payroll is processed bi-weekly, with paydays occurring every other Friday. Employees can expect their paychecks to be deposited directly into their bank accounts on these scheduled dates. To access your pay stubs, please log into the employee portal using your credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section where you will find a link to view and download your pay stubs. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs, please contact the HR department for assistance.
